title: Peanut Butter Kebab Wrap
description: A delicious and easy to make snack or meal using peanut butter and kebab wrap.
instructions: 1. Preheat a pan over medium heat.
2. Lay the kebab wrap on a flat surface.
3. Spread 1 tablespoon of peanut butter on the center of the wrap.
4. Add the cooked and shredded kebab meat on top of the peanut butter.
5. Add the chopped lettuce, diced tomato, and sliced cucumber on top of the meat.
6. Fold the bottom half of the wrap up over the filling.
7. Fold in the sides and roll the wrap up tightly.
